3D Massing & Visualization · for Planners & Developers

Your master plan, built real — in days, not weeks.

BIM Ops Studio turns a 2D plan into an editable Revit massing model with photoreal renders. Real geometry, real scale — ready for your board, your public meeting, your entitlement.

Same model · two states
The model is real. The render just makes it look built.

Not a static SketchUp block and not a one-off illustration you can't change. Every building is a parametric Revit element — so when the scheme moves, the model and the render move with it.

Same geometry · rendered overnight · zero drift →
How it works
From your plan to a board-ready model.
01 / START

From your plan

Send a site plan, DWG, PDF — or just an address. Real footprints, terrain, and street grid come from authoritative GIS and survey data.

02 / BUILD

Editable Revit massing

Heights, floor plates, setbacks — every mass is a live parametric element. Change a scheme and the model updates instead of starting over.

03 / RENDER

Photoreal on demand

Golden-hour, board-ready renders that keep your geometry exactly. Iterate scenarios overnight, not over weeks.

Who this is for
